goal: Fetch the main page of https://www.indiehackers.com/ and generate a summary report of current top stories.
detailed_instructions:
1. Use core.web.fetch to get the HTML content of https://www.indiehackers.com/.
2. Parse the HTML to extract the top stories. Look for article titles, summaries/descriptions, and any metadata like date or engagement metrics. Focus on content in main sections, headlines, or story listings.
3. Format the extracted stories into a structured summary report. Include: a title, total number of stories found, and a list of each story with title and a brief description (1-2 sentences).
4. Save the summary report to a file named 'indiehackers_summary.txt'.
5. Return a success message with the file path and a brief overview of the findings.
expected_output: A summary report file (indiehackers_summary.txt) and a confirmation message.
